commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers need to review the public taxonomy and production backfill rollout rather than queue a replacement repair PR.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff adds no dependencies or workflow execution and keeps the mutating backfill behind admin auth. (sha=570e51ef283ae8e9d182dc3a6b6fd9b38628c0c9)
commands.review_summary:
Adds derived OpenClaw provider/onboarding capability tags, exact capability-tag package filtering in API/CLI paths, a capability-tag reconciliation backfill, and docs/spec coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a reported bug. The relevant verification is after-change CLI/API/backfill proof, which is now present as copied terminal output in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to review the public taxonomy and production backfill rollout rather than queue a replacement repair PR.

target.title: feat: add contextual onboarding capability tags
target.body:
## Summary

- derive stable provider-kind and onboarding-readiness capability tags from OpenClaw manifest metadata during package publishing
- add exact `--capability-tag <tag>` filtering to `clawhub package explore` in browse and search modes
- add an idempotent, dry-run-capable, cursor-based reconciliation backfill for existing package releases and package/search projections
- document the stable capability-tag contract and backfill invariants

## Derived tag contract

- `capability:model-provider` from non-empty top-level `providers`
- `capability:speech-provider` from non-empty `contracts.speechProviders`
- `capability:web-search-provider` from non-empty `contracts.webSearchProviders`
- `capability:image-generation-provider` from non-empty `contracts.imageGenerationProviders`
- `capability:music-generation-provider` from non-empty `contracts.musicGenerationProviders`
- `setup:text-inference`, `setup:image-generation`, and `setup:music-generation` from valid `providerAuthChoices[].onboardingScopes`
- omitted, empty, or unsupported-only onboarding scopes default to `setup:text-inference`, matching OpenClaw behavior
- existing tags such as `provider:<id>` are preserved; publisher-claimed derived tags are replaced
- non-string provider declarations are ignored; `setup:speech` is intentionally not added

## Backfill design

- dry-run capable, idempotent, bounded, cursor-based, resumable, and scheduled using existing ClawHub maintenance conventions
- reads stored extracted manifests/package metadata with storage fallback
- repairs release capabilities plus latest package, `executesCode`, `latestVersionSummary`, search digest, and capability digest projections
- supports legacy packages that identify the latest release through `tags.latest`
- caps reconciliation pages at four releases for Convex bytes-read safety

No production backfill or production mutation was run.

## Verification

- `bunx vitest run convex/functions.test.ts convex/lib/packageRegistry.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts` - 569 passed
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src -- src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts` - 80 passed
- `bun run ci:static` - passed
- `bun run ci:unit` - 3176 passed, 1 skipped
- `bun run ci:types-build` - passed
- `bun run ci:packages` - passed
- `bun run docs:smoke` - passed
- live read-only CLI browse and search proof captured below
- exact-head local Convex dry-run proof for a legacy bundle manifest captured below
- trusted autoreview finding addressed: the backfill now loads supported legacy bundle-manifest paths

## Real behavior proof

Collected on June 14, 2026 from pushed head `570e51ef283ae8e9d182dc3a6b6fd9b38628c0c9`.

### Live read-only registry CLI

The production registry has not received this PR's derived tags or backfill, so
`capability:model-provider` is expected to remain empty until deployment. These
commands made read-only requests only. The existing-tag controls demonstrate
that the branch CLI forwards exact capability-tag filters in both browse and
search modes.

```console
$ ./clawhub --registry https://clawhub.ai package explore --capability-tag requires-paid-service --limit 3 --json | jq '{items: [.items[] | {name, capabilityTags}], nextCursorPresent: (.nextCursor != null)}'
{
  "items": [
    {
      "name": "aotrust-pdr-notarization",
      "capabilityTags": ["crypto", "financial-authority", "requires-wallet", "can-make-purchases", "requires-paid-service", "requires-sensitive-credentials"]
    },
    {
      "name": "smyx-leaf-aging-fall-prediction-analysis",
      "capabilityTags": ["requires-paid-service", "requires-sensitive-credentials"]
    },
    {
      "name": "smyx-depression-behavioral-markers-analysis",
      "capabilityTags": ["requires-paid-service", "requires-sensitive-credentials"]
    }
  ],
  "nextCursorPresent": true
}

$ ./clawhub --registry https://clawhub.ai package explore leaf --capability-tag requires-paid-service --limit 3 --json | jq '{results: [.results[] | {name: .package.name, capabilityTags: .package.capabilityTags}]}'
{
  "results": [
    {
      "name": "smyx-leaf-aging-fall-prediction-analysis",
      "capabilityTags": ["requires-paid-service", "requires-sensitive-credentials"]
    }
  ]
}

$ ./clawhub --registry https://clawhub.ai package explore --capability-tag capability:model-provider --limit 3 --json | jq '{items: [.items[] | {name, capabilityTags}], nextCursor}'
{
  "items": [],
  "nextCursor": null
}

$ ./clawhub --registry https://clawhub.ai package explore bitrouter --limit 3 --json | jq '{results: [.results[] | {name: .package.name, capabilityTags: .package.capabilityTags}]}'
{
  "results": [
    {
      "name": "@bitrouter.ai/openclaw-plugin",
      "capabilityTags": ["executes-code", "provider:bitrouter"]
    }
  ]
}

$ ./clawhub --registry https://clawhub.ai package explore bitrouter --capability-tag capability:model-provider --limit 3 --json | jq '{results: [.results[] | {name: .package.name, capabilityTags: .package.capabilityTags}]}'
{
  "results": []
}
```

### Exact-head local Convex dry run

A fresh local Convex deployment was pushed from the exact PR head and seeded
with the repository's standard local fixtures plus a local-only legacy
`bundle-plugin` release whose only plugin manifest was stored at
`.claude-plugin/plugin.json`. The complete dry run demonstrates that the
supported legacy bundle manifest is loaded and would repair both the release
and latest-package projections. The release-state hash is identical before and
after the dry run.

```console
$ bunx convex run --deployment local packages:backfillPackageCapabilityTagsInternal '{"dryRun":true,"batchSize":1,"maxBatches":10}'
{
  "cursor": null,
  "isDone": true,
  "ok": true,
  "stats": {
    "latestPackagesPatched": 1,
    "missingCapabilities": 0,
    "missingManifests": 2,
    "missingStorageBlobs": 0,
    "releasesPatched": 1,
    "releasesScanned": 3
  }
}

$ bunx convex data packageReleases --deployment local --format json --limit 10 | jq -S '[.[] | {_id, capabilities, extractedPluginManifest, extractedPackageJson}]' | shasum -a 256
f667c911cfbdffbeb62bb6d51bf47b3b0f528e2c9582105ed87f0b1ca1ab7fdc  -

$ # repeated after the dry run
f667c911cfbdffbeb62bb6d51bf47b3b0f528e2c9582105ed87f0b1ca1ab7fdc  -
```

## Intentional follow-ups

- no `setup:speech` until OpenClaw defines a canonical speech onboarding continuation
- no `setup:web-search`; canonical onboarding scopes remain text/image/music
- skills onboarding-readiness taxonomy remains a separate future contract
- live new-tag queries remain empty until deployment and a deliberate production backfill
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
